leadText: Not to be confused with the Elevator Key. The Lift Key (Japanese: エレベータのカギ Elevator Key) is a Key Item introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Lift Key allows the player to operate the elevator in Team Rocket 's Hideout , allowing them to access the section of the bottom floor where Giovanni 's office is.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method R B / R G B Rocket Hideout BF4 (dropped by a Grunt after he is defeated and spoken to once again) Y FR LG Rocket Hideout BF4 (dropped by a Grunt immediately after he is defeated) P E Team Rocket Hideout BF4 (found on a wall after defeating a Grunt )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad The key used for operating the elevator in a certain building. FR LG A key that operates the elevator in Team Rocket 's Hideout . It bears the Team Rocket logo. E An elevator key used in Team Rocket 's Hideout . P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A key that operates the elevator in the Team Rocket Hideout . It bears the Team Rocket logo.
